# hyperlinks

Hyperlink collection.

# hyperlinks.HyperlinkCollection { #hwpapi.collections.hyperlinks.HyperlinkCollection }

```python
collections.hyperlinks.HyperlinkCollection(app)
```

``doc.hyperlinks`` — collection of hyperlink controls.

Iteration yields :class:`Hyperlink` value objects extracted from the
``HeadCtrl`` chain. Named subscript matches on link ``text``; ordinal
subscript returns the nth link in document order.

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [add](#hwpapi.collections.hyperlinks.HyperlinkCollection.add) | Insert a hyperlink at the current cursor position. |
| [names](#hwpapi.collections.hyperlinks.HyperlinkCollection.names) | Link-display-text values, document order. |

### add { #hwpapi.collections.hyperlinks.HyperlinkCollection.add }

```python
collections.hyperlinks.HyperlinkCollection.add(text, url)
```

Insert a hyperlink at the current cursor position.

### names { #hwpapi.collections.hyperlinks.HyperlinkCollection.names }

```python
collections.hyperlinks.HyperlinkCollection.names()
```

Link-display-text values, document order.

# hyperlinks.Hyperlink { #hwpapi.collections.hyperlinks.Hyperlink }

```python
collections.hyperlinks.Hyperlink(text, url)
```

Value object for a single hyperlink.
